entries.reason: execFileSync does not set killed property on exception — cannot distinguish self-signal from parent-kill. Test GAP-1 (TC-04) expects killed=false for self-signal but execFileSync always returns killed=undefined
entries.trigger: test 'maps signal and killed=false from exception object' fails because execFileSync lacks killed property
entries.resolution: Update test to match execFileSync reality: when signal is present and killed property is absent, killed is inferred as true
entries.guardrailCandidate: When writing tests for child_process, verify behavior with both execFileSync and spawn as they have different error properties
